title.en: If that's the case, there's no way he'll be abl...

content.en:
"What about the evil vines?"

The Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods finally rushed to the place where the evil vines were sealed, but he found nothing, and the traces here were erased.

"The evil vine has been taken away, who did it?"

He wondered.

Those Eternal Dao Realms can't take away the Evil Punishment Vine unless they seek death, and they all come back together, and there is no time to take this Evil Punishment Vine.

Thinking about it, there is only one possibility, that is, there is a strong person who has surpassed the Eternal Dao Realm in secret, maybe a well-meaning member of the Realm Court, who came to see if he could help, but he saw the evil vine, so he took it away.

If that's the case, there's no way he'll be able to take it back.

After all, these evil vines are still ownerless, anyone can take them, and he has never got them, so why should he ask for them?

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods returned to the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods and directly said that the evil vines were gone.

As for whether he believes in these Eternal Dao Realms or not, then he doesn't care.

However, some of the lords of the country discussed it in private.

"The Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods is too picky, he has obtained the evil vine, but he said that he is gone, and he doesn't want to give us a reward, so he just says it!"

One of the lords complained.

This time I went to help, but I didn't get 960 benefits, there were still a bunch of bad things, and I also fell to a subordinate of the Eternal Dao Realm.

However, he only dared to complain one or two in private, but he didn't dare to say it to the Lord of the Great Gods.

"Forget it, the Lord of the Gods will leave soon, maybe you won't need to see him in the future!" said another Lord of the Kingdom.

If the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods knew about their complaints, he would definitely be speechless, because he really didn't get the Evil Vine.

If he obtains the evil vine, he will be cursed.

But he didn't get it, and this is scolded for nothing.

......

Ye Tian took a detour back to the entrance of the Void Domain, and then entered the Void Domain, only then did he breathe a sigh of relief.

He did not return to the human realm, but in a remote area of the void realm, he began to study the evil vines, which was also to prevent problems in the research and affect others.

"The Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods said that the evil vines can be planted in the Eternal Dao Seed, I'll try it!"

Ye Tian integrated the evil vines into his eternal Dao species.

Suddenly, the Evil Punishment Vine took root in the Eternal Dao Seed, in fact, the Evil Punishment Vine had been influencing him, but his Eternal Dao Seed was not affected at all.

Otherwise, his fate would be the same as that of the Lord of the Thousand Mountains, who was transformed into a demon by the evil vines.

After the evil vine took root in the Eternal Dao Seed, he even frantically released an energy to affect his Eternal Dao Seed, but his Eternal Dao Seed was too perfect, so naturally he would not be a demon seed, but absorbed this energy and gradually grew stronger.

This was also the first time he felt that the Eternal Dao Seed could still be promoted.

Rumble!!!!!

In the process of the ascension of the Eternal Dao Species, he seemed to feel countless mystical information, and his understanding of the Eternal Dao Species deepened.

The Eternal Dao Seed itself is a combination of rules, and it is too difficult to improve.

However, the Evil Vine can elevate the Eternal Dao Seed and make the Eternal Dao Seed grow little by little.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed gradually grew, but it also consumed a lot of energy, and gradually, the Evil Vine began to frantically absorb the energy of the outside world, and its own energy was not enough.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to frantically absorb all kinds of resources to supply the Evil Punishment Vines, so that the Evil Punishment Vines could transform their energy to strengthen the Eternal Dao Species.

The advantage of the strength of the Eternal Dao Seed is that Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Body is easier and faster, and the Dao Seed Secret Technique will also be more powerful, and his own strength is also growing.

"The Evil Punishment Vine is really too powerful, this treasure is too suitable for me, with it, my strength will definitely be comparable to those Eternal Dao Realm powerhouses of the Eternal Dao Body Perfection Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

The point is, this thing is useless for him in the future, and he can still use it for his wife and children, who are also perfect eternal Dao bodies, and they can also use evil vines.

But (CFCF) can say that the effect of the evil vine is too great.

Ye Tian muttered.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian used various resources to improve his Eternal Dao Body, and at the same time, he used the Evil Vine to improve his Eternal Dao Species.

His strength has steadily improved and he is getting stronger and stronger.

Ten million years have passed since the Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance incident.

On this day, the Lord of the Gods left the Kingdom of the Gods, and it is not clear where he went.

And his eternal decree was handed over to his disciple Qin He, who became the lord of the kingdom of all gods.

Although Qin He had reached the level of transcending the Eternal Dao Realm in half a step, he was not the first in the Myriad Gods Kingdom Alliance under the Myriad Gods Great Lord, he was only the first in speed, but his strength was not the first.

Of course.

After the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods left, he must have left him with treasures, and coupled with the Eternal Dao Realm Legion under the command of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom, no one dared to provoke him.

However, the deterrent power of the kingdom of all gods is naturally not as good as that of the lord of the kingdom of all gods.

In the future, Qin He, the new lord of the kingdom of the gods, could not be like the lord of the great kingdom of the gods, one order went down, and the other lords of the kingdom did it.

This can't happen, unless it's harmless, they'll do it, but if it's really self-interested, then no one will do it.

Ye Tian didn't care about this matter, he honestly improved his strength.

Gradually, tens of millions of years have passed.

"The shield of the Endless Realm is about to dissipate, and those forces are going to relocate!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

During this period of time, human beings have grown too many times in the Endless Realm, hundreds of Eternal Dao Realm have been born, and even more Eternal Dao powerhouses have been born, and the first batch of human beings in the Endless Realm have all been promoted to the level of the Mythical Dao Realm.

At this time.

These human beings will all relocate the giant city to the two percent of the territory divided by Ye Tian, and in the future, only these two percent of the territory will belong to Ye Tian and belong to the human race, and the other eighty percent of the territory will be occupied by other forces one after another.

Click!!

The shield is gone.

At this time, one by one the lords of the country contacted Ye Tian.

"Lords, let those forces move in!"

Ye Tian replied.

Subsequently.

One by one, the top forces and the middle forces, with a large number of Eternal Dao Realm and Eternal Dao powerhouses, rushed to the Endless Realm, began to occupy positions according to the predetermined territory, and then began to transform the territory.

And many lords of the country found that there was one more human race in the endless kingdom, and the development was not bad.

They wondered, where did this Terran come from?.
